title: geum scopulorum
intro: Geum scopulorum, also known as Rocky Mountain avens, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geum scopulorum include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Geum scopulorum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
